## 2. 🔗 Ontological Compatibility Matrix

| Unified System Element           | Is it compatible? | Notes/Justification                                      |
|----------------------------------|-------------------|----------------------------------------------------------|
| Absolute Nothingness             | ✅ / ❌            | Must not violate pre-symmetry foundational zero state    |

| FDT (Force Differentiation)      | ✅ / ❌            | Must resolve into valid force-space projections          |
| SRI (Selection Resonance Index)  | ✅ / ❌            | Must respect quantization across cross-absolute states   |
| Transfinite Chains               | ✅ / ❌            | Extension must sustain chaining and recursive closure    |
| Category-Theoretic Foundations   | ✅ / ❌            | Preferably aligns with categorical duality or functorial logic |
